entries.description: Essays and frameworks from Eitan Gorodetsky, an AI-native marketing operator: how to build and run a marketing operation on the AI layer, where Gen-AI moves ROI versus theatre, and AI governance by blast radius.
representativeQueries: what does an AI-native marketing operation actually look like
the AI-native maturity ladder: tools, assistants, colleagues, operating system
where does generative AI move marketing ROI versus theatre
AI governance that speeds you up — govern the blast radius
